title: Dragon's Breath Cover Business
hook: Dragon's Breath may be more than a spice shop, with criminal logistics and hidden operations under the surface.
playerSummary: Pebble's ties to Dragon's Breath pull the party toward a cover business tangled up in shady work and hidden loyalties.
gmTruth: Use this thread for laundering, covert logistics, internal problems inside the shop, and the risk that Dragon's Breath is a useful refuge only until it becomes a trap.
